description: Install dependencies and verify the existing baseline is green (tests pass, cdk synth works).
steps: Run 'npm install' in /projects/sandbox/cdk-sleep-ts-kiro to install node_modules.
Run 'unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx jest' to confirm existing tests pass.
Run 'unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx cdk synth' to confirm CDK synthesis succeeds.
acceptance_criteria: All existing tests pass (npx jest exits 0)
npx cdk synth produces a CloudFormation template without errors
findings: NODE_OPTIONS must be unset before running any node/npm/npx commands in this environment (proxy-bootstrap.js not found error). npm install produces deprecation warnings for inflight@1.0.6 and glob@7/10 but completes successfully. ts-jest emits TS151002 warning about hybrid module kind but tests pass. cdk synth outputs CDKMetadata resource and CDKMetadataAvailable condition by default.
